news.title: Elon Musk’s Lawyers Ask OpenAI’s President Why He Is Worth $30 Billion
news.snippet: The legal team implied in a federal trial that Greg Brockman, OpenAI’s president and co-founder, was driven by greed rather than building safe A.I.

news.title: White House Considers Vetting A.I. Models Before They Are Released
news.snippet: The Trump administration, which took a noninterventionist approach to artificial intelligence, is now discussing imposing oversight on A.I. models before they are made publicly available.

news.title: S.E.C. Settles Lawsuit Against Elon Musk Over His Twitter Disclosures
news.snippet: The agency, which has been pulling back on lawsuits against major companies, ended a case that had accused Mr. Musk of hiding his purchases of Twitter stock. He agreed to pay $1.5 million.

news.title: Elon Musk Wanted OpenAI to Go Commercial, Greg Brockman Testifies
news.snippet: Greg Brockman, OpenAI’s president, testified in a trial pitting Mr. Musk against his company that the world’s richest man was eager to change how it operated as a nonprofit.

news.title: Apple Reaches $250 Million Settlement Over Claims It Misled People on A.I.
news.snippet: Some iPhone owners will be eligible to receive $25 to $95 over claims that the tech giant oversold its artificial intelligence system, Apple Intelligence.

news.title: Coinbase Lays Off 14% of Employees as A.I. Changes Work
news.snippet: The largest U.S. crypto exchange said it was cutting jobs because of cryptocurrency market volatility and to “optimize” for the artificial intelligence era.

news.title: OpenAI’s Big Reset + A.I. in the Doctor’s Office + Talkie, a pre-1930s LLM
news.snippet: Will the rising tide of A.I. adoption lift all boats?

news.title: Apple to pay $250m to iPhone buyers over AI features lawsuit
news.snippet: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.

news.title: US to safety test new AI models from Google, Microsoft, xAI
news.snippet: New agreements between the companies and the Commerce department build on Biden-era pacts.

news.title: 'I thought he was going to hit me' OpenAI co-founder says of Musk
news.snippet: OpenAI president Greg Brockman spoke during the second week of a month-long trial between Elon Musk and OpenAI's Sam Altman.

news.title: Pornhub to become accessible again for some UK users
news.snippet: UK iPhone users who have completed Apple's device-based age checks will no longer be blocked from the site's adult content.

news.title: Oscars says AI actors and writing cannot win awards
news.snippet: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.

news.title: Pentagon says US military to be an 'AI-first' fighting force
news.snippet: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.

news.title: Spotify adds 'Verified' badges to distinguish human artists from AI
news.snippet: The music streaming platform will review criteria such as artists' live dates and social media presence.

news.title: Will AI lead to more accurate opinion polls?
news.snippet: It's cheaper and faster to collect people's opinions using AI, but will it make polls more accurate?

news.title: Twitch streamer hit by car live on camera - 'It felt like slow motion'
news.snippet: Isaiah Thomas, known as hmblzayy, was walking a 3,000-mile challenge when he was hit

news.title: OpenAI tells ChatGPT models to stop talking about goblins
news.snippet: The AI firm said that unlike previous model bugs, the issue "crept in subtly".

news.title: Tech Life
news.snippet: Workers train AI to identify everyday objects by labelling items in photos and videos.

news.title: ‘I Actually Thought He Was Going to Hit Me,’ OpenAI’s Greg Brockman Says of Elon Musk
news.snippet: OpenAI’s president wrapped his testimony on Tuesday by revealing a fiery meeting with Musk and subsequent efforts to remove several board members.

news.title: Google DeepMind Workers Vote to Unionize Over Military AI Deals
news.snippet: UK staff of Google’s AI research lab hope to block the use of the company’s artificial intelligence models in military settings.

news.title: 9 Best Portable Power Stations (2026): Power Capacity, Portability, Camping, and More
news.snippet: Whether you’re going off-grid or safeguarding against blackouts, these beefy, WIRED-tested batteries can keep the lights on.

news.title: He Couldn’t Land a Job Interview. Was AI to Blame?
news.snippet: Armed with some Python and a white-hot sense of injustice, one medical student spent six months trying to figure out whether an algorithm trashed his job application.

news.title: The Best Sustainable Surf Gear (2026): Patagonia, Billabong, Outerknown
news.snippet: Reduce unnecessary plastic waste and petroleum-based neoprene at your local break with the best sustainable wetsuits, sunglasses, and more.

news.title: SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
news.snippet: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.

news.title: Altara secures $7M to bridge the data gap that’s slowing down physical sciences
news.snippet: Altara’s AI aims to diagnose failures and help speed up R&D by unifying  data siloed across spreadsheets and legacy systems.

news.title: As crypto cools, a16z crypto raises a $2.2B fund
news.snippet: As some of the biggest VCs in crypto start to consider funding AI startups, a16z crypto's new fund will stay the course.

news.title: Apple plans to make iOS 27 a Choose Your Own Adventure of AI models
news.snippet: With Apple's latest operating system updates, users will reportedly have their pick of which third-party AI models they want to use for a host of tasks.

news.title: Airbnb co-founder taps Peter Arnell as first US chief brand architect
news.snippet: Arnell joins Gebbia’s National Design Studio under Trump to unify UX across 27,000 federal sites and streamline how Americans use government services.

news.title: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI after a chatbot allegedly posed as a doctor
news.snippet: According to Pennsylvania's filing, a Character.AI chatbot presented itself as a licensed psychiatrist during a state investigation, and also fabricated a serial number for its state medical license.

news.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant, a new default model for ChatGPT
news.snippet: The company said the model reduces hallucination in sensitive areas such as law, medicine, and finance, while maintaining the low latency of its predecessor.

news.title: PayPal says it’s ‘becoming a technology company again’ — that means AI
news.snippet: PayPal is pitching an AI-led turnaround, tying automation and restructuring to $1.5 billion in savings as it cuts jobs and works to modernize its tech stack.

news.title: Etsy launches its app within ChatGPT as it continues its AI push
news.snippet: Etsy's new native app within ChatGPT aims to be a conversational  shopping experience for users.

news.title: 五月，适合想清楚一件事｜幕启
卓驭于贝贝：向物理AI转型，是生存法则的必然选择 | 最前线
news.snippet:
文｜肖漫
  编辑｜李勤
  当下的智能汽车领域，物理 AI 已成为高频词汇，绝大多数智能驾驶算法厂商都在往“物理AI”转型。
  卓驭在北京车展上也发布了面向移动物理 AI 的原生多模态基础模型。在卓驭科技副总裁于贝贝看来，算法厂商向物理AI转型不是为了迎合资本市场而编织的想象空间，而是一条关乎厂商存亡的生存法则。
  “如果不上这条

news.title: 在硅谷，中美具身公司聊了聊了4个问题的解法
news.snippet:
文｜周鑫雨
  编辑｜杨轩
  规模化落地，今年的具身公司都在谈这个。
  数字竞速，不约而同出现在具身公司的产线、招股书、出货量上——2026年4月以来，智元机器人宣布第1万台机器人量产下线，5000到10000，只用了三个多月；宇树科技的IPO招股书也摊开了激进商业化的一角：2025年营收17.07亿元，出货量超过5500台。

news.title: 周杰伦伙伴，要被卖了
又一算力独角兽，冲击IPO
news.snippet:
作者丨韦香惠
  来源丨东四十条资本
  A股即将迎来一只“算力独角兽”，估值已站上500亿元门槛。
  主角是来自河南的超聚变数字技术股份有限公司。从今年1月提交上市辅导备案，到IPO辅导工作完成，仅用四个多月时间。
  这家公司并非“从零起步”，其前身是华为X86服务器业务，2021年受外部环境影响被整体剥离，并独立运营。随后，河南

news.title: 推理卡毛利率下滑超7%，天数智芯「降价换量」的买卖值不值？
news.snippet: 2个多月前在港股上市的天数智芯，近期发布了2025年财报。公布当天，股价下跌了10个点。在此之前，天数股价已从342港元的高位大幅回调。财报显示，天数全年营收10.34亿元，同比增长91.6%。一级市场投资人林云直言，这个表现没有达到大家的心理预期。对比其他几家国产公司这两年来的增长速度，市场给天数的营收底线预期是：12亿元。但另一方面，分析师Ethan透露，资本

news.title: 明日新程完成连续两轮融资，领跑Harness群体多智能体赛道

news.title: CVPR 2026 动态视觉智能观察梳理：Benchmark 之外的新考题已经出现
news.snippet: 如果把近几年计算机视觉的发展放在一个更长的时间尺度上去看，会发现整个领域其实一直在沿着一条非常明确但也非常受限的路径前进：研究者不断把模型做得更大，把训练数据堆得更多，把单项 benchmark 指标推得更高，于是无论是分割、重建还是生成，模型在标准任务上的表现都在持续逼近“看起来已经足够强”的状态。但如果把视角拉回到 CVPR 2026 前后这一批最新工作，会发

news.title: AI 终于学会 「自我坦白」！Anthropic最新论文震撼来袭，「内省适配器」让黑盒模型自己说出隐藏行为
news.snippet: 在过去两年的大模型工业化进程中，安全审计始终遵循着一套 “猫鼠游戏” 的默认设定：开发者微调模型以增强能力，而安全专家则通过红队测试（Red Teaming）或白盒探测来寻找潜在的 “后门” 或 “偏见”。这套逻辑的前提是：模型是一个被动的受访者，它的行为必须由外部观测者通过穷举输入或数学解构来 “审判”。然而，当 OpenAI、Anthropic、Meta 等公司全面开放微调

news.title: OpenAI 总裁布罗克曼日记曝光：称马斯克不懂 AI
news.snippet: IT之家 5 月 6 日消息，在埃隆・马斯克（Elon Musk）与 OpenAI 公司的法庭审判环节中，OpenAI 总裁格雷格 · 布罗克曼（Greg Brockman）的私人日记被公开，并作为马斯克起诉 OpenAI 的核心证据。马斯克指控 OpenAI 放弃了非营利使命，转而为布罗克曼和公司首席执行官萨姆 · 奥尔特曼（Sam Altm

news.title: SPEC CPU 2026 基准测试套件发布：体现现代硬软件重大演进
news.snippet: IT之家 5 月 6 日消息，SPEC 美国弗吉尼亚州当地时间 5 日宣布推出 SPEC CPU 2026 基准测试套件。该测试是对此前 SPEC CPU 2017 的重大迭代更新，充分体现了当今现代硬件和软件的重大演进。SPEC CPU 2026 包含 52 个基准测试，数量较 2017 版的 43 个有所增加；而源代码行数增长了一倍多。其新
